title: Fix nits and GOPATH in tutorial
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

While working through the Podman tutorial @qichan19 ran into an issue with the GOPATH not being set quite right.  I've emulated what we say in the install guide and while testing found an issue with python missing a library in the Ubuntu install.  Touched that up too.
